lines.speaker: Dodgy Squire
lines.text: Psst! Got any Void kit you don't want? Spare robes, spare helms, that kind of thing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I do?

lines.speaker: Dodgy Squire
lines.text: Might be able to take it off your hands for you. Show me what you've got, and I'll see if I can get you some Commendation Points for it.

lines.speaker: Dodgy Squire
lines.text: Just so you know, you've got a lot of Commendation points already, so I can't pay you my usual rate.

lines.speaker: Dodgy Squire
lines.text: Deal!
